metadata.title: Device-ownership erosion to OS-bound identity - right-to-repair, Windows 'Mac-ification', the Windows 10 forced cutover, AI-native OS lock-in, and the catch that ZK age-proofs still require PII at enrollment
metadata.frame: A single trust chain is being assembled from the silicon up: locked bootloaders + parts-pairing + secure boot erode device OWNERSHIP; Windows is closing (mandatory Microsoft account, TPM 2.0, the Windows-10 end-of-life cutover stranding hundreds of millions of PCs); AI-native OS features bind personalization and compute to a cloud identity; and on top of it all sits OS-level identity/age-assurance enforced by device attestation - so only a 'blessed,' account-linked, attested device can fully participate (payments, DRM, age-gated services). The privacy promise is hollow: even ZERO-KNOWLEDGE age proofs require surrendering a government ID, passport-NFC read, or face scan to the ISSUER at enrollment; ZK only hides the birthdate from the website, and device-binding defeats true anonymity. Companion to [[digitalid-os-hardware-stack]] (the enforcement layer) and [[digitalid-orchestration-real-incentive]] (the why).
metadata.relevance: Grounds WHY incumbents are the chokepoint at the device layer and connects the ownership-erosion / repair / Windows / AI-OS threads to the identity stack; supplies the rigorous 'ZK does not save it' argument (PII at enrollment) that backs the project's reject-age-verification stance ([[age-verification-abolition]]).
metadata.sources: iFixit/Repair.org/PIRG + EU Directive (EU) 2024/1799 + CA SB 244/Oregon SB 1596/Colorado (right-to-repair); FTC 'Nixing the Fix' + FTC/MN/IL v. Deere (2025); Microsoft/BleepingComputer/Tom's Hardware/Neowin (Windows account, TPM 2.0, Pluton, Win10 EOL/ESU, Store ads, 24H2 breakage); DoublePulsar/TechSpot/GeekWire (Recall); Apple security blog (Private Cloud Compute); EU age-verification blueprint + Google Wallet ZKP + EFF + Brave + AEPD (Yoti EUR950k) + TechCrunch (Discord/Tea breaches). Full URLs in the rendered .md.
metadata.note: Stranded-PC (~240-400M) and e-waste (~1.06B lb) figures are analyst/advocacy estimates (weak); KB5063878 SSD causation and Pluton lock-in are contested.

ownership_erosion.summary: You increasingly hold a license to a device the vendor still controls - parts-pairing, locked bootloaders, in-hardware subscriptions, and remote bricking.

points.detail: Apple pairs component serials (screen, battery, camera, Face ID) to the logic board, so genuine-part swaps trigger warnings/loss of function unless Apple 'authorizes' them; John Deere restricts diagnostic/calibration software to dealers so farmers can't complete repairs. Oregon's SB 1596 (2024) became the first state law to BAN parts-pairing for devices made on/after 1 Jan 2025.

In-hardware subscriptions (BMW heated seats, ~$18/mo - dropped Sept 2023 after backlash; Mercedes ~$1,200/yr to unlock factory-capable acceleration; the Snoo bassinet paywalled features, dead on resale); remote bricking (Spotify Car Thing bricked Dec 2024, told owners to discard it); Nintendo's 2025 terms reserve the right to render a Switch 'permanently unusable' for modification.

US/Canada Snapdragon Samsung devices generally can't unlock the bootloader; unlocking trips the Knox e-fuse permanently, disabling Samsung Pay/Secure Folder - justified by DRM/payments attestation. The bootloader lock is the same hardware-attestation root that later gates identity.

right_to_repair.summary: The countervailing movement is winning laws - but parts-pairing and attestation blunt them.

points.detail: EU Right to Repair Directive (EU) 2024/1799 (in force Jul 2024; transposition by Jul 2026) mandates affordable repair, parts/tools/info, and bars software techniques that impede repair. US: California SB 244 (effective Jul 2024, 7-year parts/docs for >$100 goods); Oregon's parts-pairing ban; Colorado (wheelchairs, farm equipment, parts-pairing). FTC 'Nixing the Fix' (2021) found 'scant evidence' repair limits are justified by safety.

The 2023 AFBF-Deere MOU (no enforcement mechanism, 30-day exit) was followed by FTC + Minnesota + Illinois suing Deere (Jan 2025) for monopolizing repair; the court denied Deere's motion to dismiss (June 2025); a ~$99M class-action settlement reported 2026 with a second suit pending.
points.grade: fact + contested (2026 settlement terms via trade press)

points.detail: Right to Repair Europe argues Apple's Self Service Repair fails as genuine R2R because parts-pairing/serialization and post-repair 'authorization' still gate function and make repairs uneconomic; France opened an investigation into parts-pairing as a possible deceptive practice. The repair laws and the attestation chain pull in opposite directions.

windows_closing.summary: Windows is being closed toward an account-bound, attested appliance - and the Windows-10 cutover forces the move.

points.detail: Windows 11 requires a Microsoft Account at setup (the local-account bypass scripts are being removed), plus TPM 2.0, UEFI Secure Boot, and a supported-CPU list; the Microsoft-designed Pluton security processor shifts the root-of-trust toward Microsoft (lock-in fears partly rebutted - Linux still boots - but the control-shift critique stands). KB5036980 (Apr 2024) put Store/Copilot ads in the Start menu by default.

Windows 10 support ended 14 Oct 2025. Consumer Extended Security Updates run only to 13 Oct 2026 via three paths: free IF you sync settings to a Microsoft Account, 1,000 Microsoft Rewards points, or a one-time $30 (the 'free' path forces an account + cloud sync). An estimated ~240-400M PCs can't meet the Windows 11 bar (analyst/advocacy estimates), drawing e-waste criticism (~1.06B lb cited).

Windows 11 24H2 caused BSODs on DRAM-less NVMe SSDs (Oct 2024, fixed via firmware); the Aug-2025 update KB5063878 was linked by community testing to SSDs/HDDs disappearing and possible data corruption under sustained writes (Phison/WD responded; Microsoft reported difficulty reproducing - causation contested). The forced cutover is happening while updates are visibly breaking machines.

ai_native_os.summary: AI-native OS features make the cloud-bound account the OS entry point - the new lock-in.

points.detail: Microsoft Recall (announced May 2024, Copilot+ PCs) screenshots the screen into a searchable index; early builds captured passwords/financial data unencrypted, forcing a June-2024 pull and an April-2025 relaunch (VBS enclaves, AES-256-GCM, Windows Hello, opt-in) - but a searchable screen-history honeypot persists. Copilot is woven into the OS.

Apple Intelligence runs on-device with overflow to 'Private Cloud Compute' (Secure Enclave, attested, stateless) but is gated to recent Apple silicon + the Apple account; Google's Gemini is increasingly the default Android assistant tied to a Google account. The assistant's memory/personalization is bound to a cloud identity, raising switching costs beyond traditional OS lock-in.

zk_still_needs_pii.summary: The decisive catch: even ZERO-KNOWLEDGE age verification requires surrendering PII to the issuer first - ZK hides the birthdate from the website, not from the issuer, and device-binding defeats anonymity.

points.item: How the ZK age-proof actually works
points.detail: Credential-based age verification is two steps: (1) an ISSUER (government / mobile-OS / bank) verifies the user's real identity and date of birth - via passport-NFC, ID scan, bank KYC, or facial age estimation - and signs a credential; (2) ONLY THEN can the holder present a ZK 'over-18' proof to a website without revealing the birthdate. So PII is disclosed to the issuer even when concealed from the relying party. Confirmed by the EU age-verification blueprint and Google's own Wallet-ZKP description (2025).

Per the EU blueprint, onboarding is via eIDs, passports/ID cards, national identity providers, bank KYC, or MNO SIM-issuance identity - all PII. Even 'facial age estimation' (Yoti) PROCESSES A BIOMETRIC: Spain's AEPD fined Yoti EUR950k (Mar 2026) for unlawful biometric processing, invalid consent, and excessive retention - rejecting the vendor's claim that age estimation isn't special-category data.

Discord's age-verification vendor (5CA) breach exposed ~70,000 government-ID images (Oct 2025); the Tea app leaked ~72,000 images incl. ID photos + selfies (and ~1.1M messages, Jul 2025). The PII surrendered at enrollment is a concrete breach surface, not hypothetical - and Discord expanded mandatory verification anyway (EFF, 2026).

ZK reduces disclosure to the RELYING PARTY but not to the ISSUER; it requires trusting the issuer + a hardware-attested device/wallet; and unlinkability + privacy-preserving revocation are optional/forthcoming, not shipped by default. Device-binding/attestation means access is never truly anonymous - the only zero-PII option is no verification (EFF, Brave). A reported case had Yoti flag a GrapheneOS user during a console age check - privacy-seeking penalized.

convergence.summary: It is one trust chain, not separate stories.

points.detail: Locked bootloaders + parts-pairing (ownership erosion) -> secure boot + Pluton + hardware-backed attestation (Play Integrity, Apple App Attest) -> OS-bound identity/age-assurance: only a blessed, account-linked, attested device can fully participate. This structurally PENALIZES repair (third-party parts break attestation) and OS freedom (custom ROMs fail integrity, [[digitalid-os-hardware-stack]]), and turns the device itself into the enforcement point for the control rail in [[digitalid-orchestration-real-incentive]].

non_claims: Secure boot, attestation, and on-device AI are genuine security/utility features - the point is they ALSO compose into an ownership/anonymity-eroding chokepoint.
Stranded-PC (~240-400M) and e-waste (~1.06B lb) are analyst/advocacy estimates (weak); KB5063878 SSD data-loss causation and Pluton 'lock-in' are contested.
No claim that ZK is broken cryptographically - the claim is narrower and stronger: ZK does not remove the enrollment-side PII disclosure to the issuer, and device-binding defeats anonymity.
No motive is imputed to any vendor; effects, incentives, and the composed capability are documented, intent is not inferred.
Overlay edges are EXCLUDED from the SCC / Z3 / TLA+ proofs.

edges.raw_instrument: Windows 11 TPM 2.0/Secure Boot/CPU hard requirement + mandatory Microsoft account + Store ads + Windows 10 EOL (Oct 2025; ESU $30 or MS-account-gated 'free') stranding ~240-400M PCs
edges.note: OVERLAY: OS closing / forced cutover; excluded from proofs

edges.raw_instrument: parts-pairing/serialization gating genuine-part repair (Oregon banned it 2025); bootloader/attestation as the ownership-control root
edges.note: OVERLAY: repair erosion; excluded from proofs

edges.raw_instrument: locked bootloaders + secure boot + Pluton -> hardware attestation chain that gates payments/DRM/age-gated services to blessed, account-linked devices (third-party parts + custom ROMs fail integrity)
edges.note: OVERLAY: the trust chain to OS identity; excluded from proofs

edges.raw_instrument: Copilot + Recall (screenshot-everything; 2024 backlash, rebuilt 2025) bind personalization/memory to a central account identity - the new account lock-in
edges.note: OVERLAY: AI-OS lock-in; excluded from proofs

edges.raw_instrument: the account-bound AI assistant becomes the OS entry point, deepening the identity binding that the attestation/age layer rides on
edges.note: OVERLAY: identity binding; excluded from proofs

edges.raw_instrument: issue device-bound credentials only AFTER collecting government ID / passport-NFC / face scan; ZK hides the birthdate from the website, not from the issuer; enrollment honeypots leaked (Discord ~70k IDs, Tea ~72k; AEPD fined Yoti EUR950k)

limits: Maps the device-up trust chain: ownership erosion (parts-pairing, locked bootloaders, in-hardware subscriptions, remote bricking) vs right-to-repair (EU Directive 2024/1799, CA SB 244, Oregon parts-pairing ban, FTC v. Deere); Windows closing (mandatory MS account, TPM 2.0, Pluton, Store ads) + the Windows-10 EOL forced cutover (Oct 2025; ESU $30/account-gated; ~240-400M PCs stranded - estimate) + 24H2 breakage; AI-native OS lock-in (Recall, Apple Intelligence, Gemini); and the decisive catch that ZK age-proofs still require PII to the ISSUER at enrollment (EU blueprint; Google Wallet ZKP; AEPD EUR950k Yoti; Discord/Tea breaches; EFF/Brave). Stranded-PC/e-waste figures and KB5063878 causation are weak/contested. Overlay edges excluded from proofs.

checks.result: Apple parts-pairing + Apple's Apr-2024 response; Oregon SB 1596 parts-pairing ban (2025); EU Directive 2024/1799; CA SB 244; FTC+MN+IL v. Deere (Jan 2025, motion to dismiss denied Jun 2025).

Win11 mandatory MS account/TPM 2.0/Pluton; Start-menu ads (KB5036980); Win10 EOL 14 Oct 2025, consumer ESU to 13 Oct 2026 ($30/Rewards/account-sync); ~240-400M stranded (estimate); 24H2 SSD BSOD + KB5063878 (contested).
Recall announced May 2024, pulled Jun 2024, relaunched Apr 2025; Apple Private Cloud Compute; Gemini default Android assistant.

EU blueprint + Google Wallet ZKP: issuer verifies ID/DOB before any ZK proof; AEPD fined Yoti EUR950k (Mar 2026, biometric); Discord ~70k IDs / Tea ~72k breaches; EFF/Brave: only zero-PII option is no verification.
